public_note: This portal publishes approved summaries only. Private runtime state, secrets, customer data, and raw internal logs are not exposed.

release_ledger.title: AION Observatory bootstrap
release_ledger.summary: A static GitHub public portal was initialized without paid APIs, external databases, customer data, or automatic outreach.

next_controlled_milestones: Approve the public/private repository boundary and retire conflicting cloud-first claims.
Publish a sanitized system map generated from verified local state reports.
Add the first evidence-backed opportunity record with provenance and human approval.
Add a governed monetization experiment with cost-to-serve and gross-margin fields.
Enable GitHub Pages only after secret scanning and manual review pass.
